name: Thiksey Monastery
description: A breathtaking 12-story complex perched high on a hill, bearing a striking resemblance to the Potala Palace in Tibet. It houses a massive 15-meter high Maitreya Buddha.
history: Founded in the mid-15th century belonging to the Gelug sect of Tibetan Buddhism.
famousFor: Potala Palace resemblance, giant Maitreya Buddha, stunning sunrises.
